
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
makeWidth = function(inputWidth) {
  if (inputWidth>826) {
    return 346
  }
  else {
    return (width-100) / 2
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
germanLocale = d3.formatLocale({
  decimal: ",",
  thousands: "",
  grouping: [3], 
  currency: ["€", " "],
})

hexToRgb = function(hex) {
  const bigint = parseInt(hex.replace(/^#/, ""), 16)
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255
  const b = bigint & 255
  return `(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
colors = [
  "#72bb6f",
  "#559bd5",
  "#f3d039",
  "#c3423f", 
  "#12a7e7",
  "#96b428",
  "#559e8f",
  "#f3d039",
  "#559e8f",
  "#2d5b5e",
]
colors_diverging = [
  "#2d76b3", 
  "#559bd5", 
  "#99c4e6",
  "#bbd7ee", 
  "#ddebf7", 
  "#e3f1e2", 
  "#c7e3c6", 
  "#abd6a9", 
  "#72bb6f", 
  "#4b9847",
]
colors_npr = [
  "#D62021",
  "#000000",
  "#237BBD",
]
colors_burger = [
  "#D62300",
  "#FF8732",
  "#502314",
  "#F5EBDC",
  "#198737",
  "#FFAA00",
]
colors_oekostrom = [
  "#05a56f",
  "#eb6761",
  "#b4e800",
  "#26c4d3",
  "#d28cec",
  "#aaaaaa",
  "#ffffff",
  "#ffd925"
]
colors_fiw = [
  "#3e5ba2", // deep blue
  "#df5154", // vibrant red
  "#4caf50", // green
  "#ffb74d", // orange
  "#9575cd", // purple
  "#26c6da", // cyan
  "#f06292", // pink
  "#ffd54f"  // yellow
]

// Lebensmittel (Food)
path1 = "M18.512 9.60361C16.5667 8.57956 14.3509 8 11.9998 8C9.64864 8 7.43288 8.57956 5.48755 9.60362M9.99977 11H10.0098M12.9998 14H13.0098M11.9998 21L3.56396 6.23735C6.04988 4.81376 8.92979 4 11.9998 4C15.0697 4 17.9497 4.81376 20.4356 6.23735L11.9998 21Z"

// Wohnen (Housing)
path2 = "M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"

// Energie (Energy)
path3 = "M9 21c0 .55.45 1 1 1h4c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1H9v1zm3-19C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9c0 2.38 1.19 4.47 3 5.74V17c0 .55.45 1 1 1h6c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-2.26c1.81-1.27 3-3.36 3-5.74 0-3.86-3.14-7-7-7z"

// Mobilität (Mobility)
path4 = "M18.92 6.01C18.72 5.42 18.16 5 17.5 5h-11c-.66 0-1.21.42-1.42 1.01L3 12v8c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1h12v1c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-8l-2.08-5.99zM6.5 16c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5S5.67 13 6.5 13s1.5.67 1.5 1.5S7.33 16 6.5 16zm11 0c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5zM5 11l1.5-4.5h11L19 11H5z"

// Güter (Goods)
path5 = "M16 4c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2h-4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2H4l-2 2v3h2v12h16V9h2V6l-2-2h-4z"

// Dienstleistungen (Services)
path6 = "M22.5 22.5L1.5 22.5L1.5 20.59L2.46 18.68L21.55 18.68L22.5 20.59ZM11.75 5.32h.49a9.3 9.3 0 0 1 9.3 9.3v.25H2.45v-.25a9.3 9.3 0 0 1 9.3-9.3ZM12 1.5v3.82M9.14 1.5h5.72M5.32 14.86h13.36v3.82H5.32Z"

// Emissionen (Emissions - Factory with smoke)
path7 = "M21,26.65V24.8a1.25,1.25,0,0,0-1.26-1.26H13.84a1.26,1.26,0,0,0-1.26,1.26V26a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1.26,1.26h.1l-.23,3.49A1.28,1.28,0,0,0,12.58,32v1.22a1.27,1.27,0,0,0,.9,1.21L12.2,54.6a1.17,1.17,0,0,0,.32.91,1.23,1.23,0,0,0,.9.39H22.13l-.88-13.73a1.26,1.26,0,0,0,1-1.23V32A1.25,1.25,0,0,0,21,30.77l-.22-3.49Z M17.27,21.43A2.46,2.46,0,0,0,19,20.7a2.42,2.42,0,0,0,.51-.76A3.55,3.55,0,0,0,22,18.88,3.46,3.46,0,0,0,23,17a4,4,0,1,0-3.07-6.83,4,4,0,0,0-1.17,2.59,3.68,3.68,0,0,0-1.86,1,3.63,3.63,0,0,0-1,3.17,3.92,3.92,0,0,0-.33.27A2.49,2.49,0,0,0,14.8,19a2.48,2.48,0,0,0,2.47,2.47Z"
```
